name: ghost-font-decoder
description: Reveal text hidden in ghost-font videos and motion-defined random-dot clips using optical flow and OCR.

interface.shortDescription: Reveal motion-hidden text in noisy videos
interface.longDescription: Decode text that is invisible in paused frames but appears through counter-moving dots or noise. The plugin uses dense optical flow, drift compensation, image cleanup, and optional OCR.
defaultPrompt: Decode the hidden message in this ghost-font video.
Check this noisy video for motion-defined text.
